title: SEC3: send_message and send_whisper duplicate ClearMessage serialization
description: client.rs lines 258-302: `send_message` and `send_whisper` both contain identical blocks: construct `ClearMessage::Chat { text }`, `serde_json::to_vec` it, `B64.encode` the result, then extract `message_id` from the response. The only difference is the RPC method name (`broadcast` vs `whisper`) and the extra `to` field. This is the MLS insertion point per the CLAUDE.md invariant — when MLS lands, the payload-building logic will need to change in both places simultaneously. Extract a private `fn build_payload(text: &str) -> String` (or similar) so the MLS substitution happens once.
